MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY BEHRENS, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT SEDIE, GINA DELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
